description: Remove remaining bun references from root monorepo source comments, config files, and test code missed by the first cleanup PRD

userStories.title: Remove bun references from platform source comments and config
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all source code comments and config to accurately describe current Node/Vitest behavior without referencing the old bun runtime
acceptanceCriteria: platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.ts lines 543-544: comment no longer says 'Bun fires the close handler synchronously' — reword to describe the defensive assignment pattern without referencing Bun
platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.test.ts line 863: comment no longer says 'Bun convention' — reword to describe current behavior
platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.test.ts line 880: same as line 863 — remove 'Bun convention' reference
platform/browser-extension/src/tool-dispatch.test.ts line 44: comment no longer says 'Bun's mock.module' — reword to describe Vitest's module mocking
platform/browser-extension/src/message-router.test.ts line 10: comment no longer says 'when Bun runs all test files' — reword to reference Vitest
platform/browser-extension/src/sanitize-svg.ts line 10: comment no longer says 'Bun's test runner' — reword to reference Vitest
eslint.config.ts line 143: comment no longer says 'Bun/Node' — change to just 'Node'
userStories.notes:
This is a supplemental cleanup — a separate PRD (prd-remove-bun-references) already handles .gitignore, .gitguardian.yaml, scripts/dev.ts, config.test.ts, http-routes.test.ts line 832 (bunServer), and resolver.test.ts. This story covers the remaining locations that PRD missed.

Files to edit:

1. platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.ts lines 543-544: Comment says 'Assign the new WS BEFORE closing the previous one. Bun fires the close handler synchronously during ws.close()'. The defensive pattern is still correct for Node.js ws library too. Reword to: 'Assign the new WS BEFORE closing the previous one. The close handler may fire synchronously during ws.close()' — remove the Bun-specific attribution.

2. platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.test.ts line 863: Comment says '// Successful upgrade returns undefined (Bun convention)'. Change to '// Successful upgrade returns undefined'.

3. platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.test.ts line 880: Same as above — '// Successful upgrade returns undefined (Bun convention)' → '// Successful upgrade returns undefined'.

4. platform/browser-extension/src/tool-dispatch.test.ts line 44: Comment says 'Bun's mock.module is process-global'. Change to 'Vitest's mock.module is process-global' or 'Module mocking is process-global'.

5. platform/browser-extension/src/message-router.test.ts line 10: Comment says 'when Bun runs all test files in the same process'. Change to 'when Vitest runs all test files in the same process' or 'when the test runner runs all test files in the same process'.

6. platform/browser-extension/src/sanitize-svg.ts line 10: Comment says 'in Bun's test runner (no DOM dependency — pure string processing)'. Change to 'in the test runner (no DOM dependency — pure string processing)' or 'in Vitest (no DOM dependency — pure string processing)'.

7. eslint.config.ts line 143: Comment says 'Node globals for server, CLI, scaffolding, and test code (runs in Bun/Node)'. Change to 'Node globals for server, CLI, scaffolding, and test code (runs in Node)'.

8. .prettierignore line 5: Remove the 'bun.lock' line entirely. No bun.lock file exists in the repo.
